001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect;
018
019import static java.lang.Character.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
023import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
024
025import java.lang.reflect.*;
026import java.util.*;
027import java.util.function.*;
028import java.util.stream.*;
029
030import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.*;
032
033/**
034 * Maps arbitrary values to classes, methods, fields, and constructors based on name-based patterns.
035 *
036 * <p>
037 * This utility allows you to create flexible mappings between reflection elements and custom values.
038 * It supports various pattern formats for identifying classes and their members, with intelligent
039 * matching that handles inner classes, method signatures, and field names.
040 *
041 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
042 * <p class='bjava'>
043 *    <jc>// Create a map that associates visibility levels with specific classes/methods</jc>
044 *    ReflectionMap&lt;Visibility&gt; <jv>map</jv> = ReflectionMap
045 *       .<jsm>create</jsm>(Visibility.<jk>class</jk>)
046 *       .append(<js>"com.foo.MyClass"</js>, Visibility.<jsf>PUBLIC</jsf>)
047 *       .append(<js>"com.foo.MyClass.secretMethod"</js>, Visibility.<jsf>PRIVATE</jsf>)
048 *       .append(<js>"com.foo.MyClass.internalField"</js>, Visibility.<jsf>PACKAGE</jsf>)
049 *       .build();
050 *
051 *    <jc>// Find values for specific reflection elements</jc>
052 *    Stream&lt;Visibility&gt; <jv>classVisibility</jv> = <jv>map</jv>.find(MyClass.<jk>class</jk>);
053 *    Stream&lt;Visibility&gt; <jv>methodVisibility</jv> = <jv>map</jv>.find(<jv>secretMethod</jv>);
054 * </p>
055 *
056 * <h5 class='section'>Supported Pattern Formats:</h5>
057 *
058 * <p>
059 * The following pattern formats are supported for mapping keys:
060 *
061 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
062 *  <li><b>Classes:</b>
063 *       <ul>
064 *          <li>Fully qualified:
065 *             <ul>
066 *                <li><js>"com.foo.MyClass"</js>
067 *             </ul>
068 *          <li>Fully qualified inner class:
069 *             <ul>
070 *                <li><js>"com.foo.MyClass$Inner1$Inner2"</js>
071 *             </ul>
072 *          <li>Simple class name:
073 *             <ul>
074 *                <li><js>"MyClass"</js>
075 *             </ul>
076 *          <li>Simple inner class:
077 *             <ul>
078 *                <li><js>"MyClass$Inner1$Inner2"</js>
079 *                <li><js>"Inner1$Inner2"</js>
080 *                <li><js>"Inner2"</js>
081 *             </ul>
082 *          <li>All classes wildcard:
083 *             <ul>
084 *                <li><js>"*"</js>
085 *             </ul>
086 *       </ul>
087 *    <li><b>Methods:</b>
088 *       <ul>
089 *          <li>Fully qualified with args:
090 *             <ul>
091 *                <li><js>"com.foo.MyClass.myMethod(String,int)"</js>
092 *                <li><js>"com.foo.MyClass.myMethod(java.lang.String,int)"</js>
093 *                <li><js>"com.foo.MyClass.myMethod()"</js>
094 *             </ul>
095 *          <li>Fully qualified without args (matches any args):
096 *             <ul>
097 *                <li><js>"com.foo.MyClass.myMethod"</js>
098 *             </ul>
099 *          <li>Simple with args:
100 *             <ul>
101 *                <li><js>"MyClass.myMethod(String,int)"</js>
102 *                <li><js>"MyClass.myMethod(java.lang.String,int)"</js>
103 *                <li><js>"MyClass.myMethod()"</js>
104 *             </ul>
105 *          <li>Simple without args (matches any args):
106 *             <ul>
107 *                <li><js>"MyClass.myMethod"</js>
108 *             </ul>
109 *          <li>Simple inner class:
110 *             <ul>
111 *                <li><js>"MyClass$Inner1$Inner2.myMethod"</js>
112 *                <li><js>"Inner1$Inner2.myMethod"</js>
113 *                <li><js>"Inner2.myMethod"</js>
114 *             </ul>
115 *       </ul>
116 *    <li><b>Fields:</b>
117 *       <ul>
118 *          <li>Fully qualified:
119 *             <ul>
120 *                <li><js>"com.foo.MyClass.myField"</js>
121 *             </ul>
122 *          <li>Simple:
123 *             <ul>
124 *                <li><js>"MyClass.myField"</js>
125 *             </ul>
126 *          <li>Simple inner class:
127 *             <ul>
128 *                <li><js>"MyClass$Inner1$Inner2.myField"</js>
129 *                <li><js>"Inner1$Inner2.myField"</js>
130 *                <li><js>"Inner2.myField"</js>
131 *             </ul>
132 *       </ul>
133 *    <li><b>Constructors:</b>
134 *       <ul>
135 *          <li>Fully qualified with args:
136 *             <ul>
137 *                <li><js>"com.foo.MyClass(String,int)"</js>
138 *                <li><js>"com.foo.MyClass(java.lang.String,int)"</js>
139 *                <li><js>"com.foo.MyClass()"</js>
140 *             </ul>
141 *          <li>Simple with args:
142 *             <ul>
143 *                <li><js>"MyClass(String,int)"</js>
144 *                <li><js>"MyClass(java.lang.String,int)"</js>
145 *                <li><js>"MyClass()"</js>
146 *             </ul>
147 *          <li>Simple inner class:
148 *             <ul>
149 *                <li><js>"MyClass$Inner1$Inner2()"</js>
150 *                <li><js>"Inner1$Inner2()"</js>
151 *                <li><js>"Inner2()"</js>
152 *             </ul>
153 *       </ul>
154 *    <li><b>Multiple patterns:</b>
155 *       <ul>
156 *          <li>A comma-delimited list of any patterns above:
157 *             <ul>
158 *                <li><js>"com.foo.MyClass, com.bar.OtherClass"</js>
159 *                <li><js>"MyClass.method1, MyClass.method2, MyClass.field1"</js>
160 *             </ul>
161 *       </ul>
162 * </ul>
163 *
164 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5>
165 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
166 *    <li>Method and constructor patterns without parentheses match any method signature.
167 *    <li>Method and constructor argument types can be specified with simple or fully qualified names.
168 *    <li>Array types in signatures use either <js>"Type[]"</js> or JVM notation like <js>"[LType;"</js>.
169 *    <li>Generic type parameters are stripped from method signatures during matching.
170 *    <li>Patterns are case-sensitive.
171 * </ul>
172 *
173 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5>
174 * <ul class='seealso'>
175 *    <li class='jc'>{@link ClassInfo}
176 *    <li class='jc'>{@link MethodInfo}
177 *    <li class='jc'>{@link FieldInfo}
178 *    <li class='jc'>{@link ConstructorInfo}
179 * </ul>
180 *
181 * @param <V> The type of values stored in this map.
182 */
183@SuppressWarnings({
184   "java:S115" // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention (e.g., PROP_classEntries)
185})
186public class ReflectionMap<V> {
187
188   // Property name constants
189   private static final String PROP_classEntries = "classEntries";
190   private static final String PROP_constructorEntries = "constructorEntries";
191   private static final String PROP_fieldEntries = "fieldEntries";
192   private static final String PROP_methodEntries = "methodEntries";
193
194   /**
195    * Builder for creating {@link ReflectionMap} instances.
196    *
197    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
198    * <p class='bjava'>
199    *    ReflectionMap&lt;String&gt; <jv>map</jv> = ReflectionMap
200    *       .<jsm>create</jsm>(String.<jk>class</jk>)
201    *       .append(<js>"MyClass"</js>, <js>"value1"</js>)
202    *       .append(<js>"MyClass.myMethod"</js>, <js>"value2"</js>)
203    *       .build();
204    * </p>
205    *
206    * @param <V> The type of values stored in this map.
207    */
208   public static class Builder<V> {
209      final List<ClassEntry<V>> classEntries;
210      final List<MethodEntry<V>> methodEntries;
211      final List<FieldEntry<V>> fieldEntries;
212      final List<ConstructorEntry<V>> constructorEntries;
213
214      /**
215       * Constructor.
216       */
217      protected Builder() {
218         classEntries = list();
219         methodEntries = list();
220         fieldEntries = list();
221         constructorEntries = list();
222      }
223
224      /**
225       * Adds one or more mappings to this builder.
226       *
227       * <p>
228       * This method accepts pattern strings that identify classes, methods, fields, or constructors,
229       * and associates them with the specified value. Multiple patterns can be specified in a single
230       * key using comma-delimited format.
231       *
232       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
233       * <p class='bjava'>
234       *    Builder&lt;String&gt; <jv>builder</jv> = ReflectionMap.<jsm>create</jsm>(String.<jk>class</jk>);
235       *
236       *    <jc>// Map a class</jc>
237       *    <jv>builder</jv>.append(<js>"com.foo.MyClass"</js>, <js>"classValue"</js>);
238       *
239       *    <jc>// Map a specific method</jc>
240       *    <jv>builder</jv>.append(<js>"MyClass.myMethod(String,int)"</js>, <js>"methodValue"</js>);
241       *
242       *    <jc>// Map multiple patterns at once</jc>
243       *    <jv>builder</jv>.append(<js>"MyClass.field1, MyClass.field2, MyClass.field3"</js>, <js>"fieldValue"</js>);
244       * </p>
245       *
246       * @param key
247       *    The mapping key pattern(s).
248       *    <br>Can be any of the following:
249       *    <ul>
250       *       <li>Fully qualified class name (e.g., <js>"com.foo.MyClass"</js>)
251       *       <li>Simple class name (e.g., <js>"MyClass"</js>)
252       *       <li>All classes wildcard (e.g., <js>"*"</js>)
253       *       <li>Method with signature (e.g., <js>"com.foo.MyClass.myMethod(String,int)"</js>)
254       *       <li>Method without signature (e.g., <js>"MyClass.myMethod"</js>) - matches any signature
255       *       <li>Field (e.g., <js>"MyClass.myField"</js>)
256       *       <li>Constructor (e.g., <js>"MyClass(String,int)"</js>)
257       *       <li>Comma-delimited list of any of the above (e.g., <js>"MyClass, MyClass.method1, MyClass.field1"</js>)
258       *    </ul>
259       * @param value
260       *    The value to associate with the matching reflection element(s).
261       *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
262       * @return This object.
263       * @throws RuntimeException If the key pattern is invalid or empty.
264       */
265      public Builder<V> append(String key, V value) {
266         if (Utils.e(key))  // NOAI
267            throw rex("Invalid reflection signature: [{0}]", key);
268         try {
269            splitNames(key, k -> {
270               if (k.endsWith(")")) {
271                  int i = k.substring(0, k.indexOf('(')).lastIndexOf('.');
272                  if (i == -1 || isUpperCase(k.charAt(i + 1))) {
273                     constructorEntries.add(new ConstructorEntry<>(k, value));
274                  } else {
275                     methodEntries.add(new MethodEntry<>(k, value));
276                  }
277               } else {
278                  var i = k.lastIndexOf('.');
279                  if (i == -1) {
280                     classEntries.add(new ClassEntry<>(k, value));
281                  } else if (isUpperCase(k.charAt(i + 1))) {
282                     classEntries.add(new ClassEntry<>(k, value));
283                     fieldEntries.add(new FieldEntry<>(k, value));
284                  } else {
285                     methodEntries.add(new MethodEntry<>(k, value));
286                     fieldEntries.add(new FieldEntry<>(k, value));
287                  }
288               }
289         });
290         } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") IndexOutOfBoundsException e) {
291         throw rex("Invalid reflection signature: [{0}]", key);
292         }
293
294         return this;
295      }
296
297      /**
298       * Builds a new {@link ReflectionMap} from the current state of this builder.
299       *
300       * <p>
301       * Multiple calls to this method will create independent copies of the map.
302       *
303       * @return A new immutable {@link ReflectionMap} instance.
304       */
305      public ReflectionMap<V> build() {
306         return new ReflectionMap<>(this);
307      }
308
309      /**
310       * Splits a comma-delimited key string into individual keys, respecting escaped commas within parentheses.
311       *
312       * @param key The key string to split.
313       * @param consumer The consumer to accept each split key.
314       */
315      private static void splitNames(String key, Consumer<String> consumer) {
316         if (key.indexOf(',') == -1) {
317            consumer.accept(key);
318         } else {
319            var m = 0;
320            var escaped = false;
321            for (var i = 0; i < key.length(); i++) {
322               var c = key.charAt(i);
323               if (c == '(')
324                  escaped = true;
325               else if (c == ')')
326                  escaped = false;
327               else if (c == ',' && ! escaped) {
328                  consumer.accept(key.substring(m, i).trim());
329                  m = i + 1;
330               }
331            }
332            consumer.accept(key.substring(m).trim());
333         }
334      }
335   }
336
337   private static class ClassEntry<V> {
338      // Property name constants
339      private static final String PROP_fullName = "fullName";
340      private static final String PROP_simpleName = "simpleName";
341      private static final String PROP_value = "value";
342
343      final String simpleName;
344      final String fullName;
345      final V value;
346
347      ClassEntry(String name, V value) {
348         this.simpleName = simpleClassName(name);
349         this.fullName = name;
350         this.value = value;
351      }
352
353      public boolean matches(Class<?> c) {
354         if (c == null)
355            return false;
356         return classMatches(simpleName, fullName, c);
357      }
358
359      protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
360         // @formatter:off
361         return filteredBeanPropertyMap()
362            .a(PROP_fullName, fullName)
363            .a(PROP_simpleName, simpleName)
364            .a(PROP_value, value);
365         // @formatter:on
366      }
367
368      @Override
369      public String toString() {
370         return r(properties());
371      }
372   }
373
374   private static class ConstructorEntry<V> {
375      // Property name constants
376      private static final String PROP_args = "args";
377      private static final String PROP_fullClassName = "fullClassName";
378      private static final String PROP_simpleClassName = "simpleClassName";
379      private static final String PROP_value = "value";
380
381      String simpleClassName;
382      String fullClassName;
383      String[] args;
384      V value;
385
386      ConstructorEntry(String name, V value) {
387         var i = name.indexOf('(');
388         this.args = splitMethodArgs(name.substring(i + 1, name.length() - 1));
389         for (var j = 0; j < args.length; j++) {
390            // Strip off generic parameters (e.g., "List<String>[]" -> "List[]")
391            args[j] = stripGenerics(args[j]);
392         }
393         name = name.substring(0, i).trim();
394         this.simpleClassName = simpleClassName(name);
395         this.fullClassName = name;
396         this.value = value;
397      }
398
399      public boolean matches(Constructor<?> m) {
400         if (m == null)
401            return false;
402         var c = m.getDeclaringClass();
403         return classMatches(simpleClassName, fullClassName, c) && (argsMatch(args, m.getParameterTypes()));
404      }
405
406      protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
407         // @formatter:off
408         return filteredBeanPropertyMap()
409            .a(PROP_args, args)
410            .a(PROP_fullClassName, fullClassName)
411            .a(PROP_simpleClassName, simpleClassName)
412            .a(PROP_value, value);
413         // @formatter:on
414      }
415
416      @Override
417      public String toString() {
418         return r(properties());
419      }
420   }
421
422   private static class FieldEntry<V> {
423      // Property name constants
424      private static final String PROP_fieldName = "fieldName";
425      private static final String PROP_fullClassName = "fullClassName";
426      private static final String PROP_simpleClassName = "simpleClassName";
427      private static final String PROP_value = "value";
428
429      String simpleClassName;
430      String fullClassName;
431      String fieldName;
432      V value;
433
434      FieldEntry(String name, V value) {
435         var i = name.lastIndexOf('.');
436         var s1 = name.substring(0, i);
437         var s2 = name.substring(i + 1);
438         this.simpleClassName = simpleClassName(s1);
439         this.fullClassName = s1;
440         this.fieldName = s2;
441         this.value = value;
442      }
443
444      public boolean matches(Field f) {
445         if (f == null)
446            return false;
447         var c = f.getDeclaringClass();
448         return classMatches(simpleClassName, fullClassName, c) && (eq(f.getName(), fieldName));
449      }
450
451      protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
452         // @formatter:off
453         return filteredBeanPropertyMap()
454            .a(PROP_fieldName, fieldName)
455            .a(PROP_fullClassName, fullClassName)
456            .a(PROP_simpleClassName, simpleClassName)
457            .a(PROP_value, value);
458         // @formatter:on
459      }
460
461      @Override
462      public String toString() {
463         return r(properties());
464      }
465   }
466
467   private static class MethodEntry<V> {
468      // Property name constants
469      private static final String PROP_args = "args";
470      private static final String PROP_fullClassName = "fullClassName";
471      private static final String PROP_methodName = "methodName";
472      private static final String PROP_simpleClassName = "simpleClassName";
473      private static final String PROP_value = "value";
474
475      String simpleClassName;
476      String fullClassName;
477      String methodName;
478      String[] args;
479      V value;
480
481      MethodEntry(String name, V value) {
482         var i = name.indexOf('(');
483         this.args = i == -1 ? null : splitMethodArgs(name.substring(i + 1, name.length() - 1));
484         if (nn(args)) {
485            for (var j = 0; j < args.length; j++) {
486               // Strip off generic parameters (e.g., "List<String>[]" -> "List[]")
487               args[j] = stripGenerics(args[j]);
488            }
489         }
490         name = i == -1 ? name : name.substring(0, i);
491         i = name.lastIndexOf('.');
492         var s1 = name.substring(0, i).trim();
493         var s2 = name.substring(i + 1).trim();
494         this.simpleClassName = simpleClassName(s1);
495         this.fullClassName = s1;
496         this.methodName = s2;
497         this.value = value;
498      }
499
500      public boolean matches(Method m) {
501         if (m == null)
502            return false;
503         var c = m.getDeclaringClass();
504         // @formatter:off
505         return
506            classMatches(simpleClassName, fullClassName, c)
507            && (eq(m.getName(), methodName))
508            && (argsMatch(args, m.getParameterTypes()));
509         // @formatter:on
510      }
511
512      protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
513         // @formatter:off
514         return filteredBeanPropertyMap()
515            .a(PROP_args, opt(args).map(x -> '[' + toCdl(x) + "]").orElse(null))
516            .a(PROP_fullClassName, fullClassName)
517            .a(PROP_methodName, methodName)
518            .a(PROP_simpleClassName, simpleClassName)
519            .a(PROP_value, value);
520         // @formatter:on
521      }
522
523      @Override
524      public String toString() {
525         return r(properties());
526      }
527   }
528
529   /**
530    * Creates a new builder for constructing a {@link ReflectionMap}.
531    *
532    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
533    * <p class='bjava'>
534    *    ReflectionMap&lt;String&gt; <jv>map</jv> = ReflectionMap
535    *       .<jsm>create</jsm>(String.<jk>class</jk>)
536    *       .append(<js>"com.foo.MyClass"</js>, <js>"value1"</js>)
537    *       .append(<js>"com.foo.MyClass.myMethod"</js>, <js>"value2"</js>)
538    *       .build();
539    * </p>
540    *
541    * @param <V> The type of values stored in the map.
542    * @param c The class type of values (used for type safety, not stored).
543    * @return A new builder instance.
544    */
545   @SuppressWarnings({
546      "java:S1172" // Parameter c is used for type inference, not runtime behavior
547   })
548   public static <V> Builder<V> create(Class<V> c) {
549      return new Builder<>();
550   }
551
552   private static boolean argMatches(String pattern, Class<?> type) {
553      // Extract base type and dimensions from pattern
554      var patternDims = 0;
555      var patternBase = pattern;
556      while (patternBase.endsWith("[]")) {
557         patternDims++;
558         patternBase = patternBase.substring(0, patternBase.length() - 2);
559      }
560
561      // Extract base type and dimensions from actual type
562      var typeDims = 0;
563      var typeBase = type;
564      while (typeBase.isArray()) {
565         typeDims++;
566         typeBase = typeBase.getComponentType();
567      }
568
569      // Array dimensions must match
570      if (patternDims != typeDims)
571         return false;
572
573      // If non-array, use simple comparison
574      if (patternDims == 0)
575         return eq(pattern, type.getSimpleName()) || eq(pattern, type.getName());
576
577      // For arrays, compare the component types (simple name or full name)
578      return eq(patternBase, typeBase.getSimpleName()) || eq(patternBase, typeBase.getName());
579   }
580
581   private static boolean argsMatch(String[] names, Class<?>[] args) {
582      if (names == null)
583         return true;
584      if (names.length != args.length)
585         return false;
586      for (var i = 0; i < args.length; i++) {
587         if (! argMatches(names[i], args[i]))
588            return false;
589      }
590      return true;
591   }
592
593   private static boolean classMatches(String simpleName, String fullName, Class<?> c) {
594      // For class org.apache.juneau.a.rttests.RountTripBeansWithBuilders$Ac$Builder
595      // c.getSimpleName() == "Builder"
596      // c.getFullName() == "org.apache.juneau.a.rttests.RountTripBeansWithBuilders$Ac$Builder"
597      // c.getPackage() == "org.apache.juneau.a.rttests"
598      var cSimple = cns(c);
599      var cFull = cn(c);
600      if (eq(simpleName, cSimple) || eq(fullName, cFull) || "*".equals(simpleName))
601         return true;
602      if (cFull.indexOf('$') != -1) {
603         var p = c.getPackage();
604         if (nn(p))
605            cFull = cFull.substring(p.getName().length() + 1);
606         if (eq(simpleName, cFull))
607            return true;
608         var i = cFull.indexOf('$');
609         while (i != -1) {
610            cFull = cFull.substring(i + 1);
611            if (eq(simpleName, cFull))
612               return true;
613            i = cFull.indexOf('$');
614         }
615      }
616      return false;
617   }
618
619   private static String simpleClassName(String name) {
620      var i = name.indexOf('.');
621      if (i == -1)
622         return name;
623      // Return null for fully qualified names to ensure they only match by fullName, not by simpleName.
624      // This prevents ambiguous matches where a simple name pattern might accidentally match
625      // a fully qualified pattern's simple part.
626      return null;
627   }
628
629
630   private static String stripGenerics(String type) {
631      if (type.indexOf('<') == -1)
632         return type;
633      var sb = new StringBuilder(type.length());
634      var depth = 0;
635      for (var i = 0; i < type.length(); i++) {
636         var c = type.charAt(i);
637         if (c == '<') {
638            depth++;
639         } else if (c == '>') {
640            depth--;
641         } else if (depth == 0) {
642            sb.append(c);
643         }
644      }
645      return sb.toString();
646   }
647
648   final List<ClassEntry<V>> classEntries;
649   final List<MethodEntry<V>> methodEntries;
650   final List<FieldEntry<V>> fieldEntries;
651   final List<ConstructorEntry<V>> constructorEntries;
652
653   /**
654    * Constructor.
655    *
656    * @param b The builder containing the mappings to initialize this map with.
657    */
658   protected ReflectionMap(Builder<V> b) {
659      this.classEntries = u(copyOf(b.classEntries));
660      this.methodEntries = u(copyOf(b.methodEntries));
661      this.fieldEntries = u(copyOf(b.fieldEntries));
662      this.constructorEntries = u(copyOf(b.constructorEntries));
663   }
664
665   /**
666    * Finds all values associated with the specified class.
667    *
668    * <p>
669    * This method searches for mappings that match the given class, including patterns for
670    * the fully qualified name, simple name, inner class names, and wildcard patterns.
671    *
672    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
673    * <p class='bjava'>
674    *    ReflectionMap&lt;String&gt; <jv>map</jv> = ReflectionMap
675    *       .<jsm>create</jsm>(String.<jk>class</jk>)
676    *       .append(<js>"com.foo.MyClass"</js>, <js>"value1"</js>)
677    *       .append(<js>"MyClass"</js>, <js>"value2"</js>)
678    *       .build();
679    *
680    *    <jc>// Find all values for MyClass</jc>
681    *    Stream&lt;String&gt; <jv>values</jv> = <jv>map</jv>.find(MyClass.<jk>class</jk>);
682    *    <jc>// Returns stream containing ["value1", "value2"]</jc>
683    * </p>
684    *
685    * @param c The class to find mappings for. Can be <jk>null</jk>.
686    * @return A stream of all values associated with the class. Empty stream if no matches found.
687    */
688   public Stream<V> find(Class<?> c) {
689      return classEntries.stream().filter(x -> x.matches(c)).map(x -> x.value);
690   }
691
692   /**
693    * Finds all values associated with the specified constructor.
694    *
695    * <p>
696    * This method searches for mappings that match the given constructor, considering both
697    * the declaring class and parameter types.
698    *
699    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
700    * <p class='bjava'>
701    *    ReflectionMap&lt;String&gt; <jv>map</jv> = ReflectionMap
702    *       .<jsm>create</jsm>(String.<jk>class</jk>)
703    *       .append(<js>"MyClass(String,int)"</js>, <js>"value1"</js>)
704    *       .build();
705    *
706    *    <jc>// Find value for specific constructor</jc>
707    *    Constructor&lt;?&gt; <jv>ctor</jv> = MyClass.<jk>class</jk>.getConstructor(String.<jk>class</jk>, <jk>int</jk>.<jk>class</jk>);
708    *    Stream&lt;String&gt; <jv>values</jv> = <jv>map</jv>.find(<jv>ctor</jv>);
709    * </p>
710    *
711    * @param c The constructor to find mappings for. Can be <jk>null</jk>.
712    * @return A stream of all values associated with the constructor. Empty stream if no matches found.
713    */
714   public Stream<V> find(Constructor<?> c) {
715      return constructorEntries.stream().filter(x -> x.matches(c)).map(x -> x.value);
716   }
717
718   /**
719    * Finds all values associated with the specified field.
720    *
721    * <p>
722    * This method searches for mappings that match the given field, considering both
723    * the declaring class and field name.
724    *
725    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
726    * <p class='bjava'>
727    *    ReflectionMap&lt;String&gt; <jv>map</jv> = ReflectionMap
728    *       .<jsm>create</jsm>(String.<jk>class</jk>)
729    *       .append(<js>"MyClass.myField"</js>, <js>"value1"</js>)
730    *       .build();
731    *
732    *    <jc>// Find value for specific field</jc>
733    *    Field <jv>field</jv> = MyClass.<jk>class</jk>.getField(<js>"myField"</js>);
734    *    Stream&lt;String&gt; <jv>values</jv> = <jv>map</jv>.find(<jv>field</jv>);
735    * </p>
736    *
737    * @param f The field to find mappings for. Can be <jk>null</jk>.
738    * @return A stream of all values associated with the field. Empty stream if no matches found.
739    */
740   public Stream<V> find(Field f) {
741      return fieldEntries.stream().filter(x -> x.matches(f)).map(x -> x.value);
742   }
743
744   /**
745    * Finds all values associated with the specified method.
746    *
747    * <p>
748    * This method searches for mappings that match the given method, considering the
749    * declaring class, method name, and parameter types.
750    *
751    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
752    * <p class='bjava'>
753    *    ReflectionMap&lt;String&gt; <jv>map</jv> = ReflectionMap
754    *       .<jsm>create</jsm>(String.<jk>class</jk>)
755    *       .append(<js>"MyClass.myMethod"</js>, <js>"value1"</js>)
756    *       .append(<js>"MyClass.myMethod(String)"</js>, <js>"value2"</js>)
757    *       .build();
758    *
759    *    <jc>// Find values for specific method</jc>
760    *    Method <jv>method</jv> = MyClass.<jk>class</jk>.getMethod(<js>"myMethod"</js>, String.<jk>class</jk>);
761    *    Stream&lt;String&gt; <jv>values</jv> = <jv>map</jv>.find(<jv>method</jv>);
762    *    <jc>// Returns stream containing ["value1", "value2"] - first matches any signature</jc>
763    * </p>
764    *
765    * @param m The method to find mappings for. Can be <jk>null</jk>.
766    * @return A stream of all values associated with the method. Empty stream if no matches found.
767    */
768   public Stream<V> find(Method m) {
769      return methodEntries.stream().filter(x -> x.matches(m)).map(x -> x.value);
770   }
771
772   protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
773      // @formatter:off
774      return filteredBeanPropertyMap()
775         .a(PROP_classEntries, classEntries)
776         .a(PROP_methodEntries, methodEntries)
777         .a(PROP_fieldEntries, fieldEntries)
778         .a(PROP_constructorEntries, constructorEntries);
779      // @formatter:on
780   }
781
782   @Override /* Overridden from Object */
783   public String toString() {
784      return r(properties());
785   }
786}
